nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 婆罗洲
nodes.summary: 婆罗洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联91种鸟类，包括菲律宾冢雉、Bornean crestless fireback、红头林鹧鸪等91种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Penan bulbul
nodes.summary: The Penan bulbul (Alophoixus ruficrissus) is a species of songbird in the bulbul family, Pycnonotidae. It is found in Borneo, typically in the mid-storey of broad-leaved evergreen and rainforests up to 1500 metres elevation. Subspecies Three subspecies are recognized: A. r. fowleri - (Amadon & Harrisson, 1957): Found in montane areas of Borneo, except Sabah A. r. meratusensis - Shakya et al., 2020: Found in mountains of south-eastern Borneo (Kalimantan) A. r. ruficrissus - (Sharpe, 1879): Found in mountains of north-eastern Borneo (Sabah) References
